message:
refactor: deduplicate QMCB dtype constants — r2-spill.ts imports from columnar.ts

DTYPE_F64/I64/UTF8/BOOL/F32VEC/NULL and QMCB_MAGIC were defined independently
in both files with identical values. If either drifted, spill encode/decode
would silently corrupt. Now single source of truth in columnar.ts.
